# ColleagueAI

ColleagueAI provides governed AI agents and AI controls for enterprise operations, finance, risk, compliance, legal, procurement, HR, sales, and service workflows.

## Primary pages

- https://www.colleagueai.ai/agents
- https://www.colleagueai.ai/trust
- https://www.colleagueai.ai/partners
- https://www.colleagueai.ai/privacy
- https://www.colleagueai.ai/terms
- https://www.colleagueai.ai/imprint
- https://www.colleagueai.ai/license
- https://www.colleagueai.ai/partner-agreement

## What ColleagueAI offers

ColleagueAI helps organizations deploy production-grade AI agents with governance, auditability, access control, risk scoring, and enterprise deployment controls.

The agent catalogue includes use cases across:
- Operations
- Risk and compliance
- Finance
- Legal and procurement
- HR and people operations
- Sales and marketing
- Data quality and reporting
- Service management

## Trust and deployment model

Production deployments are designed for enterprise governance, controlled access, audit trail, and customer-environment alignment.

Public demos, website forms, and partner registration flows are ColleagueAI-hosted public flows and should not receive confidential production data.

## Contact

hello@colleagueai.ai
